jk"Vªh; jktekxZ izkf/kdj.k vkSj esllZ ch,llhih,y vkSjax Vksyos fyfeVsM] gSnjkckn ¼ftls blesa blds i'pkr~~ fj;k;rxzkgh “lanfHkZr” fd;k x;k gS½ ds chp 25&01&2012 dks ,d djkj dj fy;k x;k gS A ¹iQk- la- Hkkjkjkizk@12&13@lhvks@thlh&'kfDr ukyk fcztº vyds'k 'kekZ] la;qDr lfpo 1925 GI/2013 MINISTRY OF ROAD TRANSPORT AND HIGHWAYS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 10th May, 2013 S.O. 1200(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 7 of the National Highways Act, (48 of 1956) read with Rule 3 of the National Highways Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection ) Rules, 2008, the Central Government hereby rescinds the notification number S.O. 1138(E), dated 19th November, 2001, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, sub-section (ii) of Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Shipping, Road Transport and Highways (Department of Road Transport and Highways) as a Concession Agreement has been entered between National Highway Authority of India and M/s. BSCPL Aurang Tollway Ltd., Hyderabad (hereinafter referred to as the “Concessionaire”) on 25-01-2012 for the Four laning of Chhattisgarh/ Odisha border to Aurang Section of National Highway No. 53 (old NH-6) from km. 88.000 to km. 239.000 in the State of Chhattisgarh under NHDP Phase-IV on Design, Build, Finance, Operate and Transfer (DBFOT) Toll Basis. [F. No. NHAI/12-13/CO/GC-Shakti Nalla Bridge] ALKESH SHARMA, Jt. Secy. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
